---
title: Team
---

## Principal Investigator

**Dr. Emeka Thornton** \
Group Leader, Corane Farm Research \
[ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0000-0000-0000) |
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/) |
[Email](mailto:thornton@coranefarm.org)

Emeka received his PhD from Johns Hopkins University in 2012 and completed postdoctoral training at the MRC Laboratory of Molecular Biology before joining Corane Farm Research as a Group Leader in 2018. His research focuses on the developmental assembly of sensorimotor circuits and the ultrastructural basis of activity-dependent synaptic connectivity.

## Postdocs

**Dr. Fatima Al-Rashidi** \
Postdoctoral researcher since 2023 \
Working on: ConnectTrack — large-scale reconstruction of developing sensorimotor circuits using serial FIB-SEM

**Dr. Lucas Moreira** \
Postdoctoral researcher since 2024 \
Working on: SynaptogenEM — correlative light and electron microscopy of activity-dependent synapse formation

**Dr. Claire Voisin** \
Postdoctoral researcher since 2025 \
Working on: DevCircuit — computational modeling of synapse stabilization and elimination rules

## Researchers

**Søren Nielsen** \
Research specialist since 2026 \
FIB-SEM sample preparation and large-volume EM imaging

**Yemisi Adeyinka** \
Research specialist since 2024 \
In vivo electrophysiology and optogenetics

## Alumni

| Name | Role | Years | Current position |
|------|------|-------|-----------------|
| Dr. Robert Cheng | Postdoc | 2019–2024 | Assistant Professor, Harvard Medical School |
| Dr. Ingrid Solberg | Postdoc | 2020–2025 | Assistant Professor, University of Oslo |
